TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_M‚Äôyutak, title = M‚Äôyutak, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/M‚Äôyutak} }

S.FORM: M'yutak Itiniay i Jianshi Cen no Hsinchu ko M'yutak a niyaro', 50 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 133 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 95% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 126 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 5% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 7 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal 89%, Amis( 2%, Bunun 1%, Puyuma1%, Saysiyat1%, roma1%. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'.
S.PHON: m °jo~u~utak itiniaj i *iansńßi ¶…ôn no~u ńßsin ¶ńßo~u~u ko~u m °jo~u~utak a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, * ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u taja…ĺ **%, amis( *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, po~u~ujo~u~uma*%, sajsijat*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~u °.
S.FORM: M'yutak Itiniay i Jianshi Cen no Hsinchu ko M'yutak a niyaro', 50 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 133 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 95% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 126 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 5% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 7 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal 89%, Amis( 2%, Bunun 1%, Puyuma1%, Saysiyat1%, roma1%. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'.
S.PHON: m °jo~u~utak itiniaj i *iansńßi ¶…ôn no~u ńßsin ¶ńßo~u~u ko~u m °jo~u~utak a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, * ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u taja…ĺ **%, amis( *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, po~u~ujo~u~uma*%, sajsijat*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~u °.
